description: Kernel source is linked (matrix_enum.cu). Finding already states 'The speedup includes contributions from both the GPU migration and kernel-level optimizations (fusion, early-exit predicates), which have not been isolated via ablation.' A proper ablation requires re-implementing an unfused baseline, which is out of scope for now. Occupancy data would require re-running with nvprof/ncu on the B200 cluster.
action_taken: Finding already documents kernel source and speedup breakdown.
